name: Leather Armor
description: Light protection.

name: Chain Mail
description: Heavier. Slower.

name: Plate Cuirass
description: Heavy steel plate. Soaks blows but you'll feel every step.

name: Warded Robe
description: Stitched with protective sigils — turns aside fire and arcane bolts alike.

name: Short Sword
description: A simple blade.

name: Rusted Dagger
description: A dagger eaten by rust. Still sharp enough.

name: Hunter's Bow
description: Better range.

name: Iron Ring
description: Adds constitution.

name: Lucky Charm
description: Luck of the draw.

name: War Hammer
description: Slow and devastating. Every swing is a commitment.

name: Twin Daggers
description: Two blades twice the openings.

name: Mage's Staff
description: Carved with sigils that channel thought into force.

name: Bone Club
description: A femur repurposed. Surprisingly effective.

name: Hide Armor
description: Rough and smelly but it stopped the last thing that bit this creature.

name: Silk Shroud
description: Gossamer-thin layers that catch arcane force and dissipate it.

name: Dragonscale Vest
description: Scales shed by something very old. Both kinds of protection.

name: Swift Boots
description: Light soles for light feet.

name: Scholar's Ring
description: The inscription inside reads 'pay attention'.

name: Amulet of Will
description: Hum with it under pressure and it hums back.

name: Fang Necklace
description: From something that fought back. Didn't matter.
